description: Confidence thresholds and failure-action routing for screenshot-to-design-spec extraction

color.notes: Colors measured by palette_extract are high confidence; LLM-only roles are lower

typography.notes: Font family is unreliable from screenshots; size/weight are measurable

space.notes: Grid detection gives solid measurements; off-grid values need iteration

radius.notes: Anti-aliasing adds ±1-2px uncertainty on corner detection

shadow.notes: Shadow params are the hardest to extract computationally; often LLM-only

gradient.notes: Gradient fitting works for 2-3 stops; complex gradients may be images

low_confidence_color.description: Re-run palette extraction and cross-check with LLM output

near_duplicate_colors.description: If ΔE < 5, merge tokens. If 5-8, flag for user decision.

spacing_off_grid.description: Check for sub-pixel rendering; snap to nearest 4px grid value

gradient_poor_fit.description: Region may be an image, not a CSS gradient. Re-examine with LLM.

shadow_uncertain.description: Shadow params can't be reliably extracted from screenshots. Request Figma/DevTools access.

font_family_unknown.description: Use platform detection (iOS→SF Pro, Android→Roboto, Web→system-ui). Flag as low confidence.

component_type_ambiguous.description: Store top-2 hypotheses with confidence. Let downstream consumer decide.

bbox_overlap.description: Crop the overlapping region and re-run segmentation on the crop.

stopConditions.notes: Stop if score doesn't improve by convergenceThreshold between passes
